calendar.matters:
Petition To Enforce Settlement Agreement And For Award Of Attorney Fees; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Patricia J. Speno Sharon E. Sullivan
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Off Calendar

Petition To Enforce Settlement Agreement And For Award Of Attorney Fees; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Patricia J. Speno Sharon E. Sullivan
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Continued To Mar-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marlene Getchell for and with Patricia Speno and Sharon Sullivan (Trustees). Gerard Launay for Gregory Sullivan (Former Trustee).

The Court stated that the stipulation goes beyond the terms of the settlement agreement and noted that the property address is incorrect. Ms. Getchell stated that the intent is to resolve all of the issues and that the judgment includes a lien on the property that Gregory inherited from the Mother. Mr. Gerard raised issue with language regarding the lien. The Petition to Enforce Settlement Agreement, etc. was continued to March 25, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the stiputation is signed and filed, the petition will go off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Enforce Settlement Agreement And For Award Of Attorney Fees; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Patricia J. Speno Sharon E. Sullivan
Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Continued To Feb-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Enforce Settlement Agreement And For Award Of Attorney Fees; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Patricia J. Speno Sharon E. Sullivan
Off Calendar Jan-27-2014 Continued To Feb-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Co-Trustee.
Off Calendar Aug-03-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marlene Getchell for and with Patricia Speno. Sharon Sullivan in Propria Persona. Melissa James (Creditor/Former Attorney for Gregory Sullivan) also present.

The Court noted that Mr. Launay and Gregory Sullivan were not present. Ms. Getchell stated that after the last hearing Mr. Sullivan pulled the properties (Elisio and Fulton) off the Market and fired his Attorney, that they entered into a settlement agreement on December 12, 2011, that Ms. Speno and Ms. Sullivan were to receive the Eliseo property and the Fulton Street property and that Mr. Sullivan was to receive the Geary property. Ms. Getchell also stated that the Elisio property has been sold, that Ms. Speno and Ms. Sullivan have the funds, that Mr. Sullivan has refused to resign, that he has refused to transfer the Fulton property and that the only hold up is distribution of the Fulton property. The Court stated that 30-day notice to the Trustee had been accomplished, and granted the petition to remove Gregory Sullivan as Trustee and appointed Patricia Speno and Sharon Sullivan as Co-Trustees nunc pro tunc to February 15, 2012 without bond (subject to review of the order). After meeting outside of the courtroom, the Co-Trustees agreed to pay Ms. James the sum of $3,000.00 within two weeks. Ms. James will then file a Satisfaction of Creditor's Claim. Ms. Getchell asked the Court to increase the order by that amount so that Ms. Speno and Ms. Sullivan can be reimbursed. This issue was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Co-Trustee.
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Continued To Jul-25-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Jan-18-2012 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Dec-14-2011 Continued To Jan-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Continued To Dec-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Melissa James for and with Gregory Sullivan (Trustee). Marlene Getchell for and with Patricia Speno. Sherry Sullivan also present.

Ms. James reported on status of the properties. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to sale of/not selling the Geary Street property. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than December 14, 2011. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by December 12, 2011. The First Account was continued to December 14, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of an amended account and for status of mediation. The Petition for Removal of Trustee was denied without prejudice (Ms. James to prepare the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Patricia J. Speno'S Petition For Accounting; Removal Of Gregory P. Sullivan As Trustee And Appointment Of Co-Trustees
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Denied

Patricia J. Speno'S Petition For Accounting; Removal Of Gregory P. Sullivan As Trustee And Appointment Of Co-Trustees
Off Calendar Sep-12-2011 Continued To Oct-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition for Accounting, Removal of Trustee, etc. was continued to October 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 (same hearing date of the accounting).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Lazatin.

Patricia J. Speno'S Petition For Accounting; Removal Of Gregory P. Sullivan As Trustee And Appointment Of Co-Trustees
Off Calendar Aug-29-2011 Continued To Sep-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marlene Getchell for and with Patricia Speno. Melissa James for and with Gregory Sullivan (Trustee). Sharon Sullivan (Sister) also present.

Ms. James reported that the Greenbrae property and the Fulton Street property will go on the Market, explained why the Trustee did not want to sell the Geary Street property at this time and stated that an accounting will be filed. Ms. Getchell's reply to today's petition is due by the end of the day September 6, 2011. The accounting is to be filed by the end of the day (noon) September 9, 2011. The Petition for Accounting, Removal of Trustee, etc. was continued to September 12, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the accounting.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
